title: dryopteris cristata var. clintoniana
intro: Dryopteris cristata var. clintoniana, also known as Clinton's golden shield fern, is a variety of the Dryopteris cristata plant, a type of fern native to eastern North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and acting as a natural antiseptic. Dryopteris cristata var. clintoniana can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves can also be dried and used in capsules or added to topical creams for its medicinal benefits.
